summary: Comprehensive testing of LD Finance new features completed. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend features verified working correctly. New features include: Digital Pockets (bolsillos), Floating transaction button, Transaction associations with pockets/savings/debts, Scorecards with projected amounts, and Budget comparison in table format.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' - This is a React hydration warning that doesn't affect functionality but should be fixed for cleaner code

action_items: MINOR: Fix HTML nesting warnings in Dashboard.jsx budget table - wrap table rows properly without span elements inside tbody/table
critical_code_review_comments: Pocket CRUD endpoints (GET/POST/DELETE /api/pockets, POST /api/pockets/{id}/fund) working correctly
Transaction creation with pocket_id correctly deducts from pocket balance
Transaction creation with savings_goal_id correctly increments savings goal current_amount
Transaction creation with debt_id correctly decrements debt current_amount
Budget comparison endpoint returns ALL user categories (not just ones with budgets)
Dashboard endpoint includes pockets, debts, savings_goals arrays
Floating add transaction button (data-testid=floating-add-txn-btn) opens dialog directly
Scorecards show projected amounts below real amounts
Budget comparison uses table format with Gastos/Ingresos tabs
Transaction form conditionally shows pocket/savings/debt selectors based on data availability
seed_data_creation: Test user 'test.pockets.*@example.com' with categories, savings goal, and debt created for backend testing. Test pocket 'Test Pocket UI' created and cleaned up during frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features fully tested and working: 1) Digital Pockets CRUD with funding, 2) Floating transaction button on Dashboard, 3) Transactions can associate with pockets/savings/debts, 4) Scorecards show projected+real amounts, 5) Budget comparison in table format with ALL user categories. Auth uses Google OAuth - authenticated pages tested via session cookie injection. Minor HTML nesting warning in budget table doesn't affect functionality.

pockets_crud.details: Full CRUD operations for digital pockets including funding

transaction_with_pocket.details: Creates transaction and deducts amount from pocket balance

transaction_with_savings.details: Creates transaction and increments savings goal current_amount

transaction_with_debt.details: Creates transaction and decrements debt current_amount

budget_comparison_all_categories.details: Returns ALL user categories, not just ones with budgets set

dashboard_includes_arrays.details: Response includes pockets, debts, savings_goals arrays

floating_add_txn_button.details: Gold floating button in bottom-right opens transaction dialog directly

scorecards_with_projected.details: Scorecards show 'Esperado/Proyectado' amounts below real amounts

budget_table_format.details: Budget comparison in table format with Categoria/Proyectado/Real/Estado columns

transaction_form_selectors.details: Transaction form shows pocket/savings/debt selectors when data exists

budget_tabs.details: Gastos and Ingresos tabs switch between expense and income budget tables

tests_passed: Backend: GET /api/pockets returns user pockets
Backend: POST /api/pockets creates pocket with name
Backend: GET /api/pockets after create shows new pocket
Backend: POST /api/pockets/{id}/fund adds money to pocket
Backend: POST /api/pockets/{id}/fund increments balance correctly
Backend: POST /api/pockets/nonexistent/fund returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/pockets/{id} deletes pocket
Backend: DELETE /api/pockets/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/transactions with pocket_id deducts from pocket
Backend: POST /api/transactions with savings_goal_id increments savings
Backend: POST /api/transactions with debt_id decrements debt
Backend: GET /api/budgets/comparison?budget_type=expense returns all categories
Backend: GET /api/budgets/comparison?budget_type=income returns all categories
Backend: GET /api/budgets/comparison with month parameter works
Backend: GET /api/dashboard includes pockets array
Backend: GET /api/dashboard includes debts array
Backend: GET /api/dashboard includes savings_goals array
Backend: GET /api/dashboard has full required structure
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all new components
Frontend: Floating add transaction button visible and clickable
Frontend: Pockets card visible with create button
Frontend: Budget comparison card in table format
Frontend: Expense budget table visible
Frontend: All scorecards visible (income, expenses, balance)
Frontend: Transaction dialog opens from floating button
Frontend: Pocket creation dialog works
Frontend: Budget tabs (Gastos/Ingresos) switch content
Frontend: Pocket selector appears when pockets exist
Frontend: Debt selector visible in transaction form
